why: why use FormData instead of JSON
why use FormData to upload files
how: how to upload a file in javascript
how to get all values from a form easily
how to send form with fetch
output: console log formdata shows empty but has entries

1_beginner_explanation.summary: When you have a form with 20 different inputs, manually grabbing `.value` from every single one is exhausting. The **FormData API** is a built-in browser tool that automatically scoops up all the names and values from your form and packages them into a neat object. It is also the ONLY way to easily upload files (like images or PDFs) using JavaScript via Fetch.
1_beginner_explanation.analogy: If `form.elements.email.value` is like manually picking items off shelves one by one, `new FormData(form)` is like handing a shopping list to an employee who instantly throws everything into a bag for you.

2_internal_mechanism.execution_flow: When you call `new FormData(formElement)`, the browser synchronously iterates through every nested input element that has a `name` attribute. It constructs a key-value store in memory formatted as `multipart/form-data`. When passed to `fetch()`, the browser automatically sets the correct HTTP boundaries and Content-Type headers.
2_internal_mechanism.memory: FormData objects can hold binary Blobs and Files, meaning they can consume significant memory if the user selects a large 500MB video file.

3_real_world_example.use_case: Quickly grabbing all form data and sending it to an API, including a profile picture upload.

4_common_confusion.trap: Trying to `console.log(formData)` and seeing an empty object `{}`. FormData is an iterable object, not a standard JSON object. Its contents are hidden from standard `console.log`.
4_common_confusion.fix: To see what's inside FormData, you must loop over it or convert it: `console.log(Object.fromEntries(formData))`.

6_edge_case.quirk: FormData ONLY captures inputs that have a `name` attribute. If your `<input type="text">` does not have a `name`, it will be completely ignored by FormData.
6_edge_case.code:
<!-- Ignored by FormData -->
<input id="username" type="text">

<!-- Included by FormData -->
<input name="username" type="text">
